_meta.purpose: Lighthouse CI budget targets for the SACP Web UI (spec 011 perf amendment, Phase F).
_meta.status: DEFERRED — config pinned, runtime not yet wired into CI.
_meta.activation_trigger: Phase 3 cross-spec integration audit ships the Web UI staging fixture (login + WebSocket up against a real session). Until then this file documents the budget contract; the lhci runner does not execute in CI.
_meta.manual_run: lhci autorun --config=.lighthouserc.json against a locally-running web_ui.app on http://localhost:8751.

thresholds.core_web_vitals: LCP <= 2.5s good / 4.0s needs-improvement; INP <= 200ms good / 500ms needs-improvement; CLS <= 0.1 good / 0.25 needs-improvement.
thresholds.ttfb: TTFB <= 800ms (LAN deployments will be much lower).
